title: Beellagers
description: Resource pack that makes the villagers in Minecraft into man-sized bees and other various insects.
body:
A goofy resource pack I threw together in like a week. The pack replaces all villagers into these insect looking girl(?) things. I tried my best to make the textures fit in with vanilla minecraft, taking color palettes from other mobs in-game. This also covers the zombie villagers. !!NOW UPDATED TO FINALLY, ACTUALLY HAVE WORKING ZOMBIE VILLAGERS!! I AM SO SO SORRY TO THOSE USING PRISM ET AL AND HAD TO UPDATE 87 TIMES I SWEAR IT'S ACTUALLY FIXED.

![an in-game screenshot of the bee villagers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9IB6Dbqn/images/9ef9b25dd7cdaa2b2f9afb07d7566fb0690e37ff.png)

These villagers come with an extra set of arms, an abdomen (equipped with stingers on the applicable biome variants - don't worry, they won't sting you!), and fluttering little wings where applicable :)

YOU WILL NEED [OPTIFINE](https://optifine.net/downloads) OR [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)/[ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) FOR THIS RESOURCE PACK TO WORK. It is a hard requirement. This pack utilizes CEM to change the model of the villagers itself to support the additional details. As far as I know this resource pack should work for Java 1.14 onward.

If you use any other resource packs that change the Villagers (ie Fresh Animations), you'll need to load this ABOVE that resource pack, and it'll override accordingly. This pack doesn't just change the villager textures, it changes the actual models.

- Plains: Bee / Bumblebee
- Desert: Termite
- Savanna: Ant
- Jungle: one of them shiny green bee things
- Taiga: Moth
- Snow: Arctic Butterfly
- Swamp: Mosquito

To Do:
- Villager & Zombie Villager Sounds (they still use the default sounds lol)
- Illagers
- Witches
- Mod Compatability patches for:
> - Fresh Animations
> - Stardom's Flora
> - Villagers +
> - Guard Villagers

I do not consistently use any social medias anymore, so if there's any bugs or whatever, do a seance or send a message via pigeon carrier or something.
